description: increment the coordinator cycle counter and report budget remaining
rules: call once per Observe->Decide pass to track the budget
reports when the budget is exhausted so the run can be finished
usage: Set RECORD_STORE pointing at an existing Arbor run. Output: cycle.txt. If no run exists in the store, an empty bootstrap run is created first.
limitation: Counter bookkeeping only — it does not enforce the budget or stop the run; the coordinator decides when to stop.
